scripts.coverage:vault: HARDHAT_SOURCES=./test/solidity TS_NODE_CACHE=false DISABLE_V8_COMPILE_CACHE=1 hardhat coverage --testfiles 'test/unit/Vault.test.ts' && node scripts/check-vault-coverage.mjs
scripts.deploy:hardhat: hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/CrapsGame.ts --network hardhat --deployment-id hardhat-local --write-localhost-deployment && CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=hardhat-local CRAPS_EXPORT_OUT=deployments/hardhat-deployment.json hardhat run scripts/export-deployment.ts --network hardhat
scripts.deploy:sepolia: CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=sepolia hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/CrapsGame.ts --network baseSepolia --deployment-id sepolia --parameters deployments/sepolia-params.json && CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=sepolia CRAPS_EXPORT_PARAMS=deployments/sepolia-params.json CRAPS_EXPORT_OUT=deployments/sepolia-deployment.json hardhat run scripts/export-deployment.ts --network baseSepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet: CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=mainnet hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/CrapsGame.ts --network base --deployment-id mainnet --parameters deployments/mainnet-params.json && CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=mainnet CRAPS_EXPORT_PARAMS=deployments/mainnet-params.json CRAPS_EXPORT_OUT=deployments/mainnet-deployment.json hardhat run scripts/export-deployment.ts --network base
